behavior_summary: This script implements the 'bed' object's examine (U8P_BEDEW::look) and U8P_BEDEW::use interactions.
U8P_BEDEW::look is a short examine handler that displays the single text 'bed' and then returns.
U8P_BEDEW::use implements resting: it blocks resting while the avatar is in combat or when enemies are nearby, otherwise it prompts the player for a rest duration (0–5 periods).

If the player selects a positive duration, the avatar is placed into stasis, the screen fades to black, game time is advanced by duration * 4 hours, a spawned world/cleanup update is invoked, HP and Mana are restored based on the avatar's Strength and Intelligence, the screen fades back in, and the avatar's previous stasis state is restored.
notable_control_flow: Guard: early checks call Npc::isInCombat and Npc::areEnemiesNear; if either is true, show 'This is no time to rest!' and abort.
Menu flow: present options array (strings '0'..'5'), capture choice, convert choice string to a numeric period count.
Conditional branch: if chosen count == 0 then no time advance/rest effects; if > 0 then run stasis + fade out + time advance + spawn update + stat restoration + fade in + stasis restore.
open_questions: The spawned call spawn ->FREE::func1C19 is invoked after time advance; its exact world-update/cleanup effects are inferred but not certain.
Exact HP/Mana restoration formulas are inferred (appears to U8P_BEDEW::use Strength*2 and Intelligence*2) from low-level remnants; formula confidence is medium.
The menu option '0' appears to act as 'do not rest' or immediate cancel; this is inferred from the branch structure but not explicitly documented.

main_function.name: U8P_BEDEW::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short in-world description when the player examines the bed.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player performs a 'U8P_BEDEW::look'/'examine' action on the bed object.

function_map.name: U8P_BEDEW::use
function_map.role: handle 'U8P_BEDEW::use' (resting) interaction with guards, menu selection, time advance, and stat restoration

external_calls.purpose: Check whether the avatar/NPC is currently in combat to prevent resting
Check for nearby enemies to prevent resting when danger is present
Present rest-duration options (strings '0'..'5') and capture player's choice into a local variable
Read and save the avatar's current stasis state so it can be restored after resting
Put the avatar into stasis (pause AI/input) before the time-skip and restore previous stasis after completion
Create a fade-to-black visual transition before advancing time
Advance global game time by numeric_period_count * 4 hours to simulate sleeping
Invoke a spawned world/cleanup/update operation after time advance (exact effect inferred/uncertain)
Read avatar Strength to compute HP restoration amount
Set the avatar's HP to the restored value after resting (inferred formula Strength * 2)
Read avatar Intelligence to compute Mana restoration amount
Set the avatar's Mana to the restored value after resting (inferred formula Intelligence * 2)
Fade the screen back in after time advance and stat restoration

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the 'bed' object's examine (U8P_BEDEW::look) and U8P_BEDEW::use interactions.
